transcript: Speaker A: Offisil ellarekkalum kooduthal work njan cheyyunnundu. Ennal enikku shesham join cheythavara salary ennekkal kooduthala. [I do more work than everyone in the office. But those who joined after me get more salary than me.] Speaker B: What happened? Speaker A: Ente English valare weak aanu. [My English is very weak.] Speaker B: Pedikkanda, English padikkunnath valare eluppamaanu. [Don't worry, learning English is very easy.] Speaker A: Njan randu moonnu masayi English samsarikkan sramikkunnu. Pakshe enikku kazhiyunnilla. [I've been trying to speak English for two or three months. But I can't.] Speaker B: Nee SpeakX app onnu pareekshichu nokku. [You try the SpeakX app.] Speaker A: SpeakX App? Speaker B: Ithoru AI English padana app aanu. Enne poleyulla AI adhyapakar ivide English samsarikkan padippikkukayum athu payilsikkan sahayikkukayum cheyyunnu. Ningal ennodu enthu chodyam venamenkilum chodicholu, njan athinu Englishil marupadi nalkukayum athu Englishil samsarikkan ningale payilsippikkukayum cheyyam. Ningal thettayi paranjal oru yadhartha adhyapakane pole njan athu thiruthi tharukayum cheyyum. Divasavum verum 10-15 minute ennodoppam English samsarikkan sheelichu, divasathinullil ningalkku nannayi English samsarikkan sadhikkum. [This is an AI English learning app. AI teachers like me teach you to speak English and help you practice here. You can ask me any question, I will reply in English and train you to speak in English. If you say it wrong, like a real teacher, I will correct it. Practice speaking English with me for just 10-15 minutes daily, and within days you will be able to speak English well.] Speaker A: AI teachers aavumbo athu costly aaville? [When it's AI teachers, won't it be costly?] Speaker B: Orikkalumilla, divasavum verum naalu roopa nirakkil ningalkku ezhu divasathe trial edukkaam. [Never, you can take a 7-day trial at just 4 rupees daily.] Speaker A: Oh, ithu enikku ariyillayirunnu! Njan ippa thanne athu download cheyyam. [Oh, I didn't know this! I will download it right now.]

summary: A Malayalam-speaking employee shares his frustration about earning less than newer colleagues due to his weak English. An AI avatar introduces him to the SpeakX app, explaining how its interactive AI teachers help users practice and correct their English. The ad concludes with a low-cost 7-day trial offer, prompting the user to download the app.
